overall.description: A cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall (Great Hall from Hogwarts Legacy) filled with students at long wooden tables, illuminated by thousands of floating candles suspended in the air. The scene features high vaulted ceilings, large stained glass windows, and atmospheric warm lighting creating a magical ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining area with long house tables and floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from a fixed vantage point overlooking the dining area

entered.detail: thousands of suspended candles floating in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
rows of long wooden dining tables filled with students and food
tall gothic stained glass windows with blue and red panes at the far end of the hall
tall stone walls with gothic arches and architectural details
high vaulted ceiling with wooden beams disappearing into shadow
wall-mounted torch sconces providing additional warm lighting between windows
vertical house banners hanging from the walls between the windows

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables. The space is illuminated by thousands of floating candles suspended in the air beneath a high vaulted ceiling. Large stained glass windows glow with blue light at the far end, while stone walls and hanging banners complete the magical medieval atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand gothic dining hall that emphasizes the scale and magical atmosphere of the space. It begins by capturing the vastness of the great hall, where students are gathered at long wooden tables beneath a high vaulted ceiling. The perspective then draws attention to the thousands of floating candles that cast a warm glow across the stone walls and hanging banners. Finally, the gaze settles on the far end of the hall, where large stained glass windows radiate a contrasting blue light into the medieval environment.
